hero.title: Obsessed with Brands That Move People, Turning Data into Strategy and Ideas into Impact.
hero.intro:
I've never really done things on the typical timeline and I think that's my greatest asset.
Before I ever set foot in a college classroom, I was already out in the world. I skipped a grade, graduated at 16, and spent my gap year traveling and volunteering, collecting experiences and perspectives that no degree could have given me. I have always moved with ambition, but never without intention.
Since then, I have not stopped. Every single summer, whether it was a job or volunteering, I have shown up somewhere new. A different state, a different country, a different industry. Dallas with AT&T. New York City with L'Oréal. Portugal on an academic program. Each experience added a new lens and made me sharper, more adaptable, and more confident in rooms I had never been in before.
When I got to VCU I hit the ground running. I study Marketing, Data Analytics, and Sales, but my real education has happened in the work itself: building partnerships with Fortune 500 companies, helping launch a fellowship from the ground up, and leading a 68-member organization as Executive President.
I am obsessed with brands that make people feel something and partnerships that create real mutual value. I care about the strategy behind the story, who we are talking to, why it matters, and how to make it land. That combination of sales instinct and marketing curiosity is what drives me.

jobs.blurb: Drove full-cycle partnership outreach and closed high-impact collaborations that expanded student access while improving outbound efficiency with AI-assisted workflows.

jobs.company: VCU Office of Innovation & Strategic Design
jobs.meta: Innovation & Strategic Design Fellow | Richmond, VA
jobs.blurb: Built and scaled a new innovation fellowship model by leading partner development, digital outreach, and cross-sector collaboration with university and state stakeholders.

jobs.meta: Omnichannel Education & Sales Intern | New York City, NY
jobs.blurb: Turned market intelligence and account operations into executive-ready recommendations that strengthened omnichannel strategy and expanded engagement in underserved segments.

jobs.meta: Senior Associate Marketing Intern | Dallas, TX
jobs.blurb: Translated campaign performance data into ROI-focused marketing recommendations and stakeholder communications that improved planning clarity and execution alignment.

items.name: Alpha Kappa Psi Fraternity
items.blurb: Lead a 68-member chapter and a 7-person executive board while managing a $10K budget and driving recruitment strategies that increased outcomes by 40%.

items.name: Student Managed Investment Portfolio (SMIP)
items.blurb: Analyze consumer staples opportunities with Bloomberg and IBISWorld research and collaborate with a 40-analyst team to support decisions for a $415K portfolio.

gapYear.title: Gap Year Journey
gapYear.blurb: Traveled internationally, built practical skills through independent projects and networking, and gained clear direction for long-term career goals.
